items.name: Elegant Black Linen Jacket
items.description:
Step into sophistication with the Elegant Open Collar Jacket. Perfect for any stylish avatar, this jacket features a chic open collar design and rolled-up sleeves for a relaxed yet polished look. Ideal for both casual and formal occasions. Add a touch of elegance to your avatar's wardrobe with this timeless piece.
Other colors: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=elegant%20jacket&Category=1&CreatorName=blue%20infinity%20studios&salesTypeFilter=1
